case_title: JOHNSON, DAVID vs. MEDLIN, CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDLIN, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 152 LILY, STORAGE #1, SAN FRANCISCO; CA $2,970.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,970.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. PRINCIPAL INCLUDES $2,700.00 IN BACK RENT AND $270.00 DAMAGES. DEFT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES OVERRULED BY COURT.
